onChange.template: [Overview] Apply the Gummy Fruits art style to the entire game. Soft-shaded fruits with translucent edges and vinyl figure charm. After applying, update the gameplan to reflect the new appearance.
[Overview] Apply the Cosmic Orbs art style to the entire game. Glowing planetary spheres with nebula textures and star highlights. After applying, update the gameplan to reflect the new appearance.
[Overview] Apply the Kawaii Sweets art style to the entire game. Pastel candy and dessert characters with sparkle effects. After applying, update the gameplan to reflect the new appearance.
